customValue.fullName: We urgently need a better solution
customValue.label: We urgently need a better solution

customValue.fullName: We can cope with our current solution, but are looking for a better solution
customValue.label: We can cope with our current solution, but are looking for a better solution

customValue.fullName: We want to find a few real alternatives to our solutions
customValue.label: We want to find a few real alternatives to our solutions

GlobalValueSet.description: How happy are you with your current solution to your problem?
